prompt: Create one polished 4:3 Location Sheet for the Constantinople sea walls as a single finished production reference board. Show the siege-facing wall massing, gate damage, Ottoman field approach, city-edge context, stone material, and scale relationships clearly enough for shot planning. Use the selected Movie Lookbook texture, materials, palette, and lighting behavior. No modern roads, electrical wires, signage, vehicles, debug overlays, crop marks, or labels over important visual content.
description: Siege-facing sea-wall, gate, field approach, city-edge, and stone-material reference for shot planning.
title: Sea walls Location Sheet
